dvic.shellNoTemplateBodyPart2: hasn't been transcribed into the catalog yet. Contact your admin or inspect another vehicle in the meantime.
dvic.discardWithoutPhotoAndClose: Discard this defect and close? You haven't uploaded a photo yet.
dvic.discardWithoutPhoto: Discard this defect? You haven't uploaded a photo yet.

footer.uploadAtLeastOneTip: Upload at least one photo to continue

section.heading: Where on the vehicle?
section.hint: Pick the section the inspector is currently looking at.

position.heading: Which position?
position.hint: Pick where on the vehicle the defect is.

details.heading: Extra details
details.hint: Required to fully describe this defect.

review.notesPlaceholder: Anything the structured fields don't cover…

photoGate.readyHint: Tap "Save defect" below to commit. You can add more photos before saving.
photoGate.requiredHint: Take or upload at least one photo of the defect. Without a photo this defect can't be saved.
photoGate.tip: Tip: take a wide shot first so the location of the defect is obvious, then a close-up. Compression happens locally — uploads stay fast on 4G.

committedList.emptyPart1: No defects added yet. Walk every section above — once all 6 are inspected, hit

createInspection.closeConfirm: Close the inspection wizard? Any in-progress inspection will be discarded.

step1.heading: Which DSP are you servicing today?
step1.hint: Pick the fleet whose van you're about to inspect.
step1.empty: You don't have access to any DSPs with vehicles assigned.
step1.emptyHint: Contact your admin to be assigned to a DSP fleet.

step2.hint: Count the physical keys you received. This number is logged once for the whole session and reconciled when you return them.
step2.tipPart2: doesn't hand keys for some vans (kept in box, etc.), record the actual number you received now. You can flag those vans in the review step.

step3.heading: Pick a vehicle to inspect
step3.empty: No vehicles available for this DSP yet.
step3.noVisibleFmt: {{dsp}} has no vehicles in your visibility.

step4.notInspectedHint: Tap a reason — we'll record it and drop you back at the vehicle picker.

step5.heading: Odometer reading
step5.photoHint: A wide shot of the dashboard helps disputes.
step5.photoAttached: Photo attached. You can continue to the inspection.
step5.photoRequired: A photo of the odometer is required to start the inspection.
step5.startToAttach: Start inspection to attach the odometer photo
step5.draftHint: We start a draft so the photo can be tied to the inspection. The draft becomes the inspection record once you submit at the end.

review.immutableHint: Once submitted, this inspection becomes immutable. Defects can still be acknowledged or routed to vendors by the DSP owner.

step5Defects.hint: Tap "Add defect" for any issue you find during the walkthrough. Each defect goes through a quick 3-5 tap form, then you can attach photos.
step5Defects.skipHint: If everything's fine, you can skip ahead — empty inspections are PASSED.

postSubmit.noMoreVans: No more vans pending in this DSP
postSubmit.allInspectedHint: All vans inspected — finalize the session
postSubmit.someRemainingHint_one: {{count}} van not yet inspected — you'll need to flag it
postSubmit.someRemainingHint_other: {{count}} vans not yet inspected — you'll need to flag them

completeWarning.descFmt: You inspected {{inspected}} of {{total}} vans in {{dsp}}. Pick a reason for each remaining van so the DSP knows why it wasn't inspected. Each one will be flagged in their dashboard with the reason.

fleetDone.subtitleFmt: Great work, {{name}}. The DSP dashboard is being updated now.

session.label: This session
session.anotherDspHint: Start a new session for a different fleet

liveReport.title: Live inspection report
liveReport.noDefects: No defects reported in this inspection.

photoUploader.takeOrChoose: Take photo or choose from gallery
